    • @streamd/tokens
    • ThemeColors

    Interface ThemeColors

    Color values — any valid CSS color string.

    interface ThemeColors {
        text: string;
        textMuted: string;
        background: string;
        codeBackground: string;
        preBackground: string;
        border: string;
        blockquoteAccent: string;
        link: string;
        linkHover: string;
        strong: string;
        emphasis: string;
    }
    • Defined in types.ts:12
    Index

    Properties

    text textMuted background codeBackground preBackground border blockquoteAccent link linkHover strong emphasis

    Properties

    Readonlytext

    text: string

    Default foreground text colour.

    • Defined in types.ts:14

    ReadonlytextMuted

    textMuted: string

    Muted/secondary text (e.g. list markers, captions).

    • Defined in types.ts:16

    Readonlybackground

    background: string

    Default background.

    • Defined in types.ts:18

    ReadonlycodeBackground

    codeBackground: string

    Inline code background.

    • Defined in types.ts:20

    ReadonlypreBackground

    preBackground: string

    Fenced code block background.

    • Defined in types.ts:22

    Readonlyborder

    border: string

    Border colour for table cells, hr, blockquote bar.

    • Defined in types.ts:24

    ReadonlyblockquoteAccent

    blockquoteAccent: string

    Blockquote left-rail accent colour.

    • Defined in types.ts:26

    Readonlylink

    link: string

    Link colour.

    • Defined in types.ts:28

    ReadonlylinkHover

    linkHover: string

    Link hover / focus colour.

    • Defined in types.ts:30

    Readonlystrong

    strong: string

    Strong emphasis colour (defaults to text but overridable).

    • Defined in types.ts:32

    Readonlyemphasis

    emphasis: string

    Emphasis colour.
